articles.title: Chamarajanagar Deputy Commissioner says no blazers, ties, or heavy uniforms for students amid heatwave - The Hindu
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Karnataka
articles.full_text:
The Deputy Commissioner of the Chamarajanagar district, Shreeroopa, has issued directions to educational institutions not to compel students to wear blazers, ties, and heavy uniforms due to the heatwave conditions sweeping the district.
The Deputy Commissioner’s statement was issued on Saturday (April 18, 2026), when the Chamarajanagar district recorded a maximum temperature of 38.8 degrees.
Published - April 19, 2026 12:34 pm IST
